description: Discover this beautifully maintained 3 bedroom, 2 bath townhome offering exceptional space, comfort, and convenience. The main level features a bright open-concept living and dining area, large windows that fill the home with natural light, and a well-designed kitchen with plenty of storage and counter space. It includes three generous-sized bedrooms, perfect for families, guests, or a home office. Enjoy your private outdoor space, ideal for morning coffees, BBQs, or simply unwinding after a long day. Located in a well-managed, family-friendly complex close to shopping, restaurants, transit, schools, parks, and all major amenities. Easy access to major routes makes commuting a breeze. This move-in-ready home offers unbeatable value for first-time buyers, and investors alike.
